refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Operational availability depends on both minimizing failure occurrences and reducing repair times. Decomposing availability into fault tolerance and recovery enables targeted design parameters.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period; verify availability metric against target; simulate fault injection and recovery scenarios.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize system failure occurrences to reduce downtime.
FR2: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery to restore operation quickly.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement robust fault-tolerant hardware and software components.
DP2: Integrate real-time fault monitoring and automated recovery mechanisms.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both failure prevention and recovery.

potential_sources: Interaction between fault detection and recovery mechanisms.
Dependency of hardware robustness on software monitoring.
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically coupled but can be modularized to minimize cross-dependencies.

assumptions_risks: Assumes fault detection latency is sufficiently low to enable rapid recovery.
Risk that hardware robustness alone may not meet availability without effective recovery.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider further decomposition if coupling impacts modularity or verification.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level responsibility for availability, integrating hardware robustness and recovery software.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for real-time fault data collection and status reporting.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports remote monitoring and teleoperation commands relevant to recovery.

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes availability logic and recovery coordination.
Contains hardware components affecting failure rates but limited recovery logic.
Supports remote control but less direct impact on availability.
Handles safety alerts that may influence availability but not primary owner.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Availability is best managed at the NGHE Solution level to integrate hardware robustness and recovery software cohesively.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in coordinating multiple subsystems within NGHE Solution.
Risk of diffusion if recovery logic is duplicated across Vehicle or Teleoperation modules.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor diffusion risk and consider modularizing recovery functions if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear mapping to fault tolerance and recovery.

diffusion_risks: Cross-module dependencies between hardware and software components.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module provides strong containment but requires careful interface management.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via system-level availability testing and fault injection.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of availability responsibility to NGHE Solution is clear and aligns with stakeholder expectations.

recommended_revisions: Refine recovery sub-functions if diffusion risk increases.
Define clear interface contracts for fault data exchange.

decision.justification: Current decomposition level sufficiently refines availability FR with appropriate DP selection and IM assignment; gates passed with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize system failure occurrences to reduce downtime.
FR2: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery to restore operation quickly.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; monitor diffusion risks in implementation.

assumptions: Fault detection latency is low enough for effective recovery.
Hardware robustness and software recovery can be integrated within NGHE Solution.
open_risks: Potential diffusion of recovery logic across modules.
Complexity in coordinating fault tolerance and recovery.
evidence_needed: Availability test results over evaluation period.
Fault injection and recovery performance data.
